mapper.select: SELECT ID,COMPANY_ID,COMPANY_NAME,CARGO_INFO_ID,STOREHOUSE_ID,STOREHOUSE_NAME,REGION_ID,REGION_NAME,MASS_ID,MASS_NAME, QUANTITY,TON,CREATE_BY,CREATE_BY_NAME,CREATE_TIME,UPDATE_BY,UPDATE_BY_NAME,UPDATE_TIME,CLEAN_MASS_SIGN,CLEAN_MASS_BY, CLEAN_MASS_BY_NAME,CLEAN_MASS_TIME FROM T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE where COMPANY_ID=#{companyId} and CARGO_INFO_ID=#{cargoInfoId} AND CLEAN_MASS_SIGN='0' ORDER BY ID

select sum(nvl(QUANTITY,0)) as QUANTITY, sum(nvl(TON,0)) as TON, INOUT_TYPE, INOUT_DATE, CARGO_INFO_ID from T_PRD_PORT_STORAGE_DETAIL a inner join M_WORK_PROCESS b on a.PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE=b.PROCESS_CD where CARGO_INFO_ID=#{cargoInfoId} and b.IN_OUT_STORAGE_TYPE_CD!='301'
and INOUT_DATE BETWEEN to_date(#{startDate},'yyyy-mm-dd') and to_date(#{endDate},'yyyy-mm-dd')
group by CARGO_INFO_ID, INOUT_TYPE, INOUT_DATE order by INOUT_DATE
SELECT FREE_STORAGE_DAYS FROM T_BUS_CONTRACT WHERE ID=#{contractId}

select rownum,a.* from ( SELECT ID, HISTORY_ID, STORAGE_DATE, DAYS, FIELD_STOCK_WEIGHT, ENTRY_WEIGHT, APPEARANCE_WEIGHT, FEE_STORAGE, SETTLEMENT_VOLUME, AMOUNT, RATE FROM T_STORAGE_FEE_DETAIL WHERE HISTORY_ID=#{hisGid} ORDER BY ID DESC) a where rownum=1
SELECT ID, HIS_GID, CARGO_INFO_ID, AMOUNT, TYPE FROM T_STORAGE_FEE_MIDDLE WHERE HIS_GID=#{hisId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_STORAGE_FEE_HIS( ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, CONTRACT_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, AMOUNT, BALANCES_AMOUNT, TOTAL_ENTRY, TOTAL_APPEARANCE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, TAX_RATE, TAX_CAST, AFTER_TAX, SETTLEMENT_DAYS, RATE, IS_FINAL, RATE_ID ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{startDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{balancesAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalEntry,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalAppearance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxCast,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{afterTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{settlementDays,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{isFinal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE T_STORAGE_FEE_HIS SET CONTRACT_ID=#{contractId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, AMOUNT=#{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, BALANCES_AMOUNT=#{balancesAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TOTAL_ENTRY=#{totalEntry,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TOTAL_APPEARANCE=#{totalAppearance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, SETTLEMENT_DAYS=#{settlementDays,jdbcType=BIGINT}, TAX_CAST=#{taxCast,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX_RATE=#{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, AFTER_TAX=#{afterTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, RATE=#{rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, IS_FINAL=#{isFinal,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_ID=#{rateId,jdbcType=BIGINT} WHERE ID=#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_STORAGE_FEE_DETAIL( ID, HISTORY_ID, STORAGE_DATE, DAYS, FIELD_STOCK_WEIGHT, ENTRY_WEIGHT, APPEARANCE_WEIGHT, FEE_STORAGE, SETTLEMENT_VOLUME, AMOUNT, RATE)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.historyId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.storageDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.days,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.fieldStockWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.entryWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.appearanceWeight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.feeStorage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.settlementVolume,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.rate,jdbcType=DECIMAL} from dual

INSERT INTO T_STORAGE_FEE_MIDDLE( ID, HIS_GID, CARGO_INFO_ID, AMOUNT, TYPE)
select #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.hisGid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.type,jdbcType=INTEGER} from dual
mapper.select: SELECT ID, CARGO_INFO_ID, CONTRACT_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, AMOUNT, BALANCES_AMOUNT, TOTAL_ENTRY, TOTAL_APPEARANCE, SETTLEMENT_DAYS, FREE_STORAGE_DAYS, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, TAX_RATE, TAX_CAST, AFTER_TAX, STATUS, RATE, IS_FINAL, RATE_ID FROM T_STORAGE_FEE_HIS WHERE ID=#{gid}

SELECT ID, HISTORY_ID, STORAGE_DATE, DAYS, FIELD_STOCK_WEIGHT, ENTRY_WEIGHT, APPEARANCE_WEIGHT, FEE_STORAGE, SETTLEMENT_VOLUME, AMOUNT, RATE FROM T_STORAGE_FEE_DETAIL WHERE HISTORY_ID=#{gid} ORDER BY ID
SELECT MAX(ID) FROM T_STORAGE_FEE_HIS WHERE CARGO_INFO_ID=#{cargoInfoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT(ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, IS_FINAL) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{statementNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customerId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{customerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{trustId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{trustCargoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{handoverlistId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipvoyageItemId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{settlementDate, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{isFinal, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

INSERT INTO T_COST_STATEMENT_DETAIL(ID, STATEMENT, CONTRACT_ID, RATE_ITEM_CODE, RATE_ITEM_NAME, SERVICE_CONTENT_ID, SERVICE_CONTENT_NAME, PROCESS_CODE, PROCESS_NAME, RATE, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, "NUMBER", AMOUNT, TAX, TAX_AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, BUSINESS_ID,RATE_ID) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{statement, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{contractId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateItemCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateItemName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serviceContentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serviceContentName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{processName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{number, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{businessId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{rateId, jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, STATEMENT_NO, CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, TYPE, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, HANDOVERLIST_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, STATUS, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, IS_FINAL FROM T_COST_STATEMENT WHERE ID = #{statementId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
